description_long: This object consists of two tall, cylindrical bottles with rounded shoulders and narrow necks, each topped with a matching cap. The bottles are primarily white with subtle green and gray accents, and feature printed labels on the front and back. The front label displays the brand 'MATRIX BIOLAGE' and product information, along with a delicate illustration of green plant stems. The back label is densely covered with fine text, likely containing usage instructions and ingredients. The bottles appear to be made of lightweight plastic and are designed to hold liquid shampoo. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and professional, suitable for personal care use in urban environments.
description: Two tall, cylindrical white bottles with rounded shoulders, printed labels, and matching caps, featuring green plant illustrations and detailed text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brand 'MATRIX BIOLAGE', product name, green plant illustration, and main label details.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view highlighting the smooth, unadorned sides and the cylindrical shape of the bottles.
description_view_2: Back view displaying dense, fine text covering most of the label, likely instructions and ingredients.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the transition from the back label to the plain side, with minimal visible graphics.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: tall and cylindrical with rounded shoulders and a narrow neck
